faqs.question: How do you measure this frame data?
paragraphs: We record the game at a locked 60 FPS and count the video frames one by one in editing software to determine the numbers.
There is a set standard for analyzing these. @Mrt1 please expand on this section.

faqs.question: Can I contribute to the wiki?
paragraphs: Absolutely! You can reach out directly via Discord.
Contact @.mrt1 for frame data stuff, or contact @deptr4869 for the site and general feedback.
